framework.name: Stripe Issuing Authorization Controls
framework.description: Stripe's existing card issuing infrastructure provides per-card spending limits with merchant category restrictions, time-interval boundaries (daily), and real-time approve/decline endpoints. Authorization objects track request history with cryptographic verification data (CVC, expiry, address checks).
framework.raw_quote: spending_controls: { allowed_categories: null, blocked_categories: null, spending_limits: [{ amount: 50000, categories: [], interval: 'daily' }], spending_limits_currency: 'usd' }
